name: Predator zone entry → flee modifier
description: Boid enters a predator zone: push it away from the zone center for ~2s of ticks.

name: Predator zone exit → cancel modifier
description: Boid leaves a predator zone: cancel its flee modifier (TTL also self-heals).

name: Predator zone overstay → cull
description: A boid that lingers in a predator zone past the grace window is culled: the sim observes phase=culled, removes it from physics, and reclaims its graph entity. Enabled (the rule engine skips disabled rules at load, so it must load to be toggleable) — but the flee modifier usually pushes boids out before the grace window, so a cull is the exception. Toggle this rule off, or set cull_grace_ticks=0, to disable culling.
